title: Hut 8 Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
text: Hut 8 Corp reported Q1 2026 financial results: Revenue of $71.0 million (vs. $21.8 million in Q1 2025), with breakdown as follows: Power $3.7 million, Digital Infrastructure $1.3 million, Compute $66.0 million. Net Loss of $253.1 million (vs. $134.3 million in Q1 2025) and Adjusted EBITDA loss of $(250.5) million (vs. $(117.7) million in Q1 2025). The company announced a major strategic achievement: a 15-year, 352 MW IT AI data center lease at Beacon Point with a high-investment-grade tenant, representing $9.8 billion in base-term contract value. Subsequent to quarter-end, Hut 8 closed a $3.25 billion offering of senior secured notes for River Bend construction—described as the first single-sponsor data center project to access the investment-grade construction bond market. The company refinanced its Bitcoin-backed credit facility, reducing the cost of debt from 9.0% to 7.0% and releasing approximately 3,300 BTC from collateral. Development pipeline totals 8,375 MW as of May 6, 2026, encompassing sites under diligence, exclusivity, development, and construction stages.
